summary: Verified Unit auto-increment/decrement of Product.quantity and purchase_bill_url round-trip on backend (2 different products), plus frontend Units dialog UI flow with Bill Doc column and quantity badge refresh.
passed: GET /api/products lists products with quantity field
POST /api/products/{id}/units with serial+cost auto-increments product.quantity by +1 (P1 Serial Test: 2 -> 3)
Adding 2 units under SAME product increments quantity by +2 total (P1: 2 -> 4)
Behavior confirmed on second product P2 Bulk TV 2 (2 -> 3 add, 3 -> 2 delete)
purchase_bill_url field accepted on POST and returned by GET /api/products/{id}/units (value: https://example.com/bill.pdf)
Frontend: units-btn-{sku} opens Units dialog; new-unit-billurl input renders
Frontend: 'Bill Doc' column header present in units table; 'View bill' link visible with correct href when URL provided
Frontend: Inventory table quantity badge refreshed automatically after unit add (SER-1021 badge: 2 -> 3), and toast 'Unit added, stock incremented' shown
notes: Minor non-blocker: /app/backend/server.py has a duplicated DELETE /units/{unit_id} route (delete_unit_dup at line 427) that is shadowed by the correct one at line 413; FastAPI first-match ordering keeps behavior correct, but the dead code should be removed for cleanliness. Also observed benign console warnings about Recharts container width/height and Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby — not related to this bug fix.
